enable_tag_protection.Tested example: Enable protection on a specific tag using password-based mechanism

disable_tag_protection.Tested example: Remove protection from a specific tag

enable_tag_visibility.Tested example: Enable the reader to see protected tags

disable_tag_visibility.Tested example: Revoke the reader's ability to see protected tags

enable_short_range.Tested example: Protect a tag with short-range mode enabled

start_with_gen2x.Tested example: Start radio with Gen2X features applied
